caption: A man stands before a seated audience in a room with light-colored wood paneling on the walls. He is wearing glasses, a white long-sleeved shirt, and a dark blue traditional vest with white embroidery over a red garment. He speaks into a microphone attached to a stand. In the foreground, the backs of several audience members are visible, including women with blonde and brown hair and a person wearing a purple jacket. The text "ORCA" appears in white letters on a black background on the right side of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in place, speaking and slightly shifting his head and facial expressions. The audience members remain seated and still, facing toward him. The camera angle and the overall arrangement of the people and equipment stay consistent across the frames.
